response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song "Run Back 'Round" from the on-screen text. The performers (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, Hakos Baelz) and the production source (hololive English -Promise-) were confirmed via the credits in the video. Performed a search for the lyrics of "Run Back 'Round" and successfully retrieved them from a reliable source (Genius). The lyrics are in English. The video was divided into a performance scene and a concluding credits/static scene.
response.global_summary: A performance video of the song "Run Back 'Round" by the hololive English unit "Promise" (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Hakos Baelz), followed by the music video's credits.

scenes.description: The hololive English unit "Promise" (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Hakos Baelz) perform "Run Back 'Round" on a stage with virtual lights and effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Pre-Chorus: Ouro Kronii]
Lost and found, back to where I started
I won't stay down, trust me, I can do it
I live life loud, take it to the limit
So stand up proud, now I'm gonna sing it

[Chorus: All]
Run back 'round, it's a new beginning
I run back 'round, got to keep believing
I run back 'round, I know where I'm going
I run back 'round, nothing's gonna stop me now
Woah, oh, oh!
I'm gonna run back 'round!
Woah, oh, oh!
I'm gonna run back 'round!

scenes.description: Credits roll over a continuation of the instrumental and vocal track.
